### Checklist
- [ ] `SKILL.md` has valid YAML frontmatter (title, description, version, author, license)
- [ ] All endpoints are documented with parameters, examples, and responses
- [ ] Authentication reference is included or linked
- [ ] Agent behavior guidelines are included
- [ ] Error codes are documented
- [ ] Tested with at least one agent framework
